//: Issue #550: pin the bun bundler's JSX transform to the classic runtime
//2: with `h` as the factory so JSX authored in src/web/app/main.jsx compiles
//3: to the same `h(tag, props, ...children)` calls the codebase already uses
//4: (h === React.createElement). This keeps a single React instance and lets
//5: the static guards (check-web-tdz, check-web-hardcoded-ui-strings) parse the
//6: compiled output uniformly. `Fragment` (React.Fragment) backs the <>…</> form.
